input.content:
name: Docker Image Tag Generator

on:
  push:
    branches: ["main", "master"]
    tags: ["v*"]
  pull_request:
    branches: ["main", "master"]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      git_branch:
        description: "Git branch override"
        required: false
        type: string
      git_commit:
        description: "Git commit SHA override"
        required: false
        type: string
      git_tag:
        description: "Git tag override"
        required: false
        type: string
      pr_number:
        description: "PR number override"
        required: false
        type: string

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  # Defaults – overridden per-step when fixture data is supplied
  GIT_BRANCH: ${{ github.ref_name }}
  GIT_COMMIT: ${{ github.sha }}

jobs:
  generate-tags:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Bun
        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
        with:
          bun-version: latest

      - name: Determine git context
        id: context
        shell: bash
        run: |
          # Use workflow_dispatch inputs if provided, else derive from event
          BRANCH="${{ inputs.git_branch }}"
          COMMIT="${{ inputs.git_commit }}"
          TAG="${{ inputs.git_tag }}"
          PR="${{ inputs.pr_number }}"

          # Fall back to environment / event defaults
          if [ -z "$BRANCH" ]; then
            BRANCH="${GIT_BRANCH}"
          fi
          if [ -z "$COMMIT" ]; then
            COMMIT="${GIT_COMMIT}"
          fi

          # Detect tag from ref
          if [ -z "$TAG" ] && [[ "${GITHUB_REF}" == refs/tags/* ]]; then
            TAG="${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}"
          fi

          # Detect PR number from event
          if [ -z "$PR" ] && [ "${{ github.event_name }}" = "pull_request" ]; then
            PR="${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}"
          fi

          echo "branch=${BRANCH}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "commit=${COMMIT}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "tag=${TAG}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "pr=${PR}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Generate Docker image tags
        id: tags
        shell: bash
        env:
          GIT_BRANCH: ${{ steps.context.outputs.branch }}
          GIT_COMMIT: ${{ steps.context.outputs.commit }}
          GIT_TAG: ${{ steps.context.outputs.tag }}
          PR_NUMBER: ${{ steps.context.outputs.pr }}
        run: |
          OUTPUT=$(bun run generate-tags.ts)
          echo "$OUTPUT"
          # Extract the TAGS= line for downstream jobs
          TAGS_LINE=$(echo "$OUTPUT" | grep '^TAGS=' | head -1)
          echo "${TAGS_LINE}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Display generated tags
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "Docker image tags: ${{ steps.tags.outputs.TAGS }}"

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # Test matrix – exercises the generator with various fixture inputs
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  test-tags:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        include:
          - name: main-branch
            branch: main
            commit: "a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f2a3b4c5d6e7f8a9b0"
            tag: ""
            pr: ""
            expect: "latest,main-a1b2c3d"
          - name: feature-branch
            branch: "feature/awesome-widget"
            commit: "deadbeefdeadbeefdeadbeefdeadbeefdeadbeef"
            tag: ""
            pr: ""
            expect: "feature-awesome-widget-deadbee"
          - name: pr-event
            branch: "fix/login-bug"
            commit: "1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12345678"
            tag: ""
            pr: "42"
            expect: "pr-42,fix-login-bug-1234567"
          - name: semver-tag-on-main
            branch: main
            commit: "fedcba9876543210fedcba9876543210fedcba98"
            tag: "v1.2.3"
            pr: ""
            expect: "v1-2-3,latest,main-fedcba9"
          - name: semver-tag-on-release
            branch: "release/v2.0.0"
            commit: "abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12"
            tag: "v2.0.0"
            pr: ""
            expect: "v2-0-0,release-v2-0-0-abcdef1"
          - name: uppercase-branch
            branch: "Feature/CAPS-Test"
            commit: "aabbccddee1122334455aabbccddee1122334455"
            tag: ""
            pr: ""
            expect: "feature-caps-test-aabbccd"
          - name: special-chars-branch
            branch: "feat/hello@world#2!"
            commit: "ff00ff00ff00ff00ff00ff00ff00ff00ff00ff00"
            tag: ""
            pr: ""
            expect: "feat-hello-world-2-ff00ff0"
          - name: master-branch
            branch: master
            commit: "0000000000000000000000000000000000000000"
            tag: ""
            pr: ""
            expect: "latest,master-0000000"
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Bun
        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
        with:
          bun-version: latest

      - name: "Run test: ${{ matrix.name }}"
        shell: bash
        env:
          GIT_BRANCH: ${{ matrix.branch }}
          GIT_COMMIT: ${{ matrix.commit }}
          GIT_TAG: ${{ matrix.tag }}
          PR_NUMBER: ${{ matrix.pr }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Test: ${{ matrix.name }} ==="
          OUTPUT=$(bun run generate-tags.ts)
          echo "$OUTPUT"

          # Extract actual TAGS= value
          ACTUAL=$(echo "$OUTPUT" | grep '^TAGS=' | cut -d= -f2)
          EXPECTED="${{ matrix.expect }}"

          echo "Expected: ${EXPECTED}"
          echo "Actual:   ${ACTUAL}"

          if [ "$ACTUAL" = "$EXPECTED" ]; then
            echo "PASS: ${{ matrix.name }}"
          else
            echo "FAIL: ${{ matrix.name }} — expected '${EXPECTED}' but got '${ACTUAL}'"
            exit 1
          fi

name: Docker Image Tag Generator

on:
  push:
    branches: ["main", "master"]
    tags: ["v*"]
  pull_request:
    branches: ["main", "master"]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      git_branch:
        description: "Git branch override"
        required: false
        type: string
      git_commit:
        description: "Git commit SHA override"
        required: false
        type: string
      git_tag:
        description: "Git tag override"
        required: false
        type: string
      pr_number:
        description: "PR number override"
        required: false
        type: string

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  # Defaults – overridden per-step when fixture data is supplied
  GIT_BRANCH: ${{ github.ref_name }}
  GIT_COMMIT: ${{ github.sha }}

jobs:
  generate-tags:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Bun
        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
        with:
          bun-version: latest

      - name: Determine git context
        id: context
        shell: bash
        run: |
          # Use workflow_dispatch inputs if provided, else derive from event
          BRANCH="${{ inputs.git_branch }}"
          COMMIT="${{ inputs.git_commit }}"
          TAG="${{ inputs.git_tag }}"
          PR="${{ inputs.pr_number }}"

          # Fall back to environment / event defaults
          if [ -z "$BRANCH" ]; then
            BRANCH="${GIT_BRANCH}"
          fi
          if [ -z "$COMMIT" ]; then
            COMMIT="${GIT_COMMIT}"
          fi

          # Detect tag from ref
          if [ -z "$TAG" ] && [[ "${GITHUB_REF}" == refs/tags/* ]]; then
            TAG="${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}"
          fi

          # Detect PR number from event
          if [ -z "$PR" ] && [ "${{ github.event_name }}" = "pull_request" ]; then
            PR="${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}"
          fi

          echo "branch=${BRANCH}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "commit=${COMMIT}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "tag=${TAG}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "pr=${PR}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Generate Docker image tags
        id: tags
        shell: bash
        env:
          GIT_BRANCH: ${{ steps.context.outputs.branch }}
          GIT_COMMIT: ${{ steps.context.outputs.commit }}
          GIT_TAG: ${{ steps.context.outputs.tag }}
          PR_NUMBER: ${{ steps.context.outputs.pr }}
        run: |
          OUTPUT=$(bun run generate-tags.ts)
          echo "$OUTPUT"
          # Extract the TAGS= line for downstream jobs
          TAGS_LINE=$(echo "$OUTPUT" | grep '^TAGS=' | head -1)
          echo "${TAGS_LINE}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Display generated tags
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "Docker image tags: ${{ steps.tags.outputs.TAGS }}"

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  # Test matrix – exercises the generator with various fixture inputs
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------
  test-tags:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        include:
          - name: main-branch
            branch: main
            commit: "a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f2a3b4c5d6e7f8a9b0"
            tag: ""
            pr: ""
            expect: "latest,main-a1b2c3d"
          - name: feature-branch
            branch: "feature/awesome-widget"
            commit: "deadbeefdeadbeefdeadbeefdeadbeefdeadbeef"
            tag: ""
            pr: ""
            expect: "feature-awesome-widget-deadbee"
          - name: pr-event
            branch: "fix/login-bug"
            commit: "1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12345678"
            tag: ""
            pr: "42"
            expect: "pr-42,fix-login-bug-1234567"
          - name: semver-tag-on-main
            branch: main
            commit: "fedcba9876543210fedcba9876543210fedcba98"
            tag: "v1.2.3"
            pr: ""
            expect: "v1-2-3,latest,main-fedcba9"
          - name: semver-tag-on-release
            branch: "release/v2.0.0"
            commit: "abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12"
            tag: "v2.0.0"
            pr: ""
            expect: "v2-0-0,release-v2-0-0-abcdef1"
          - name: uppercase-branch
            branch: "Feature/CAPS-Test"
            commit: "aabbccddee1122334455aabbccddee1122334455"
            tag: ""
            pr: ""
            expect: "feature-caps-test-aabbccd"
          - name: special-chars-branch
            branch: "feat/hello@world#2!"
            commit: "ff00ff00ff00ff00ff00ff00ff00ff00ff00ff00"
            tag: ""
            pr: ""
            expect: "feat-hello-world-2-ff00ff0"
          - name: master-branch
            branch: master
            commit: "0000000000000000000000000000000000000000"
            tag: ""
            pr: ""
            expect: "latest,master-0000000"
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Bun
        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
        with:
          bun-version: latest

      - name: "Run test: ${{ matrix.name }}"
        shell: bash
        env:
          GIT_BRANCH: ${{ matrix.branch }}
          GIT_COMMIT: ${{ matrix.commit }}
          GIT_TAG: ${{ matrix.tag }}
          PR_NUMBER: ${{ matrix.pr }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Test: ${{ matrix.name }} ==="
          OUTPUT=$(bun run generate-tags.ts)
          echo "$OUTPUT"

          # Extract actual TAGS= value
          ACTUAL=$(echo "$OUTPUT" | grep '^TAGS=' | cut -d= -f2)
          EXPECTED="${{ matrix.expect }}"

          echo "Expected: ${EXPECTED}"
          echo "Actual:   ${ACTUAL}"

          if [ "$ACTUAL" = "$EXPECTED" ]; then
            echo "PASS: ${{ matrix.name }}"
          else
            echo "FAIL: ${{ matrix.name }} — expected '${EXPECTED}' but got '${ACTUAL}'"
            exit 1
          fi

All tasks complete. Here's a summary of what was built:

**Files created:**

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `generate-tags.ts` | Core Docker image tag generator with `sanitiseTag()`, `generateTags()`, and CLI entry-point |
| `yaml-parser.ts` | Thin js-yaml wrapper for workflow YAML parsing |
| `generate-tags.test.ts` | Full test suite — 7 workflow structure tests + 8 act integration tests |
| `.github/workflows/docker-image-tag-generator.yml` | GitHub Actions workflow with `generate-tags` and `test-tags` jobs |
| `act-result.txt` | Captured output from all 8 act runs |

**Tag generation rules:**
- `latest` for main/master branches
- `pr-{number}` for pull requests
- `v{semver}` (e.g. `v1.2.3`) for semver tags
- `{branch}-{short-sha}` for all branches (sanitized: lowercase, special chars → hyphens)

**Test results: 15/15 passing**
- 7 workflow structure tests (YAML parsing, triggers, jobs, actionlint, file references)
- 8 act integration tests (each creates a temp git repo, runs `act push --rm`, asserts exact expected tag values)
